phases of pending industrial prob
lens, the RELATIONS between capital

At the conclusion of his speech
to the miners the president was
turned over to the Catholic Total
Abstniance Union, in annual state
convention here, and the members
of which he addressed from a stand
erected on the river front. Later
he attended patriotic exercises at
